::: {layout="[[1, 1]]"}
::: {#first-column}
**Dr. Syeda Tasneem Towhid** Associate Professor  
Department of Microbiology  
Jagannath University  
Email: towhidst@mib.jnu.ac.bd
:::

::: {#second-column style="text-align: right;"}
**Dr. Md. Salequl Islam** Professor  
Department of Microbiology  
Jahangirnagar University  
Email: salequl@juniv.edu
:::
:::
